description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a central corridor and multiple rooms arranged symmetrically on either side. The exterior walls are primarily white with large windows, and the structure includes two prominent green spaces or courtyards with visible trees and plants. The roof is mostly flat with some sections covered by translucent panels, allowing natural light into the interior. The house has a main entryway with a covered porch and glass doors, and the interior layout is open, with visible furniture and decor in several rooms. The window arrangement is regular, with large panes providing ample daylight. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and two green courtyards. The layout is symmetrical and open, with a covered main entryway and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central corridor, and two green courtyards with plants on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior walls, large windows, and the depth of the house's layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible green spaces, side windows, and the overall rectangular structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, glass double doors, and minimal decorative elements.
